page_metadata.biotools__summary: REALGAR is a an app that integrates disease-specific, tissue-specific omics results into a tool for designing functional validation studies. REALGAR uses asthma as a disease model to demonstrate how integrating omics results with GWAS data leads to improved understanding of gene associations.
